auth.checkEmail: Check your email for the confirmation link

landing.heroSubtitle: AI guides you through market research, competitor analysis and business model — in minutes, not months.
landing.heroTrust: 6 stages · Real market data · EN + UA
landing.howSubtitle: From idea to business plan in 6 guided steps
landing.step1Desc: Describe your idea, AI clarifies and structures it
landing.step2Desc: AI searches the web and Product Hunt for market data
landing.step3Desc: Find gaps and weaknesses in existing solutions
landing.step4Desc: Define what makes your solution unique
landing.step6Desc: Get a 0–100 score with actionable recommendations
landing.feature1Desc: Web search + Product Hunt give you actual competitor and trend data, not AI guesses.
landing.feature2Desc: Claude AI gives you an honest, structured verdict on your idea's potential.
landing.feature3Desc: Cards populate in real-time as AI analyses your idea — no waiting for a final report.
landing.feature4Desc: Full interface and AI responses in English and Ukrainian.
landing.feature5Desc: Complete validation in one focused session instead of weeks of manual research.
landing.feature6Desc: Walk away with a ready business model and a clear score you can share.
landing.mockupSubtitle: Real output for a real idea
landing.mockupCaption: This is the actual interface — not a marketing mockup.
landing.faq1A: Yes, completely free during the beta period. No credit card required.
landing.faq2Q: How accurate is the market research?
landing.faq2A: AI uses live web search and Product Hunt data. Results reflect real market conditions, though we always recommend validating further with actual user interviews.
landing.faq3A: Claude (Anthropic) via AWS Bedrock — one of the most capable and honest AI models available.
landing.faq4A: Yes. Each idea gets its own workspace with full chat history and dashboard. Create as many as you need.
landing.faq5A: Yes. Your ideas are stored securely and are only accessible to your account. We never use your data to train AI models.
landing.faq6A: No. Just describe your idea in plain language. The platform is designed for both first-time founders and experienced entrepreneurs.

dashboard.title: My Ideas
dashboard.newIdeaPlaceholder: Name your idea... (e.g. AI startup validator)
dashboard.noIdeasHint: Type your idea above and press Enter to start brainstorming!

artifacts.liveSubtitle: Updates as AI analyzes your idea
artifacts.emptyHint: Start chatting and AI will populate cards here automatically
artifacts.ideaSummaryTooltip: A structured overview of your startup idea: the core problem it solves, who it's for, and how to categorize it.
artifacts.competitorsTooltip: Direct and indirect competitors in your space, their strengths, weaknesses, pricing, and how closely they overlap with your idea.
artifacts.uvpTooltip: Your Unique Value Proposition — a clear statement of what makes your solution different and better than existing alternatives.
artifacts.leanCanvasTooltip: A one-page business model covering the 8 key building blocks of your startup: problem, solution, metrics, channels, segments, costs, revenue, and unfair advantage.
artifacts.scoreTooltip: Overall validation score (0–100) across 6 weighted criteria: market size, problem severity, uniqueness, feasibility, competition level, and monetization clarity.
artifacts.noCompetitorsHint: This could be a blue ocean opportunity or an untapped market

workspace.welcomeSubtitle: I'm your AI startup advisor. Describe your idea and I'll help you validate it, analyze the market, and build a business plan.
workspace.prompt1: Tell me about the problem you're solving
